steps.title: Use the opening claim
steps.content: The passage begins by saying Hawaiian silversword species illustrate adaptive radiation. The rest of the passage explains why: the species share a common ancestor but developed distinct forms as they adapted to different habitats.

steps.title: Reject overstatements
steps.content: A contradicts the passage because silverswords are physically distinct. B is background about the archipelago, and C overgeneralizes from silverswords to most plants. The main idea is that silverswords are good examples of adaptive radiation. The answer is D.
